name: subagents: both review-node-boundaries and review-node-observability emit findings in §2.3 format {severity, rule_id?, file, line, finding, suggested_fix}
command: mkdir -p src && echo "x" > src/a.js && for a in review-node-boundaries review-node-observability; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent $a --input "$PWD/src/a.js" --emit-findings "$PWD/$a.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -E "severity.*file.*line.*finding.*suggested_fix" "$PWD/$a.jsonl" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $a missing fields" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
